title: Berry Bounty
description: Special berries that can be eaten for special effects!
body:
Adds 7 different berries that can be eaten for various positive and negative effects.
- Airy Berries: Launches you up into the air and makes you lighter.
- Heavy Berries: Slows you down, fills you up, and makes you bulkier and heavier.
- Spicy Berries: Warms you up, but also sets you on fire.
- Frost Berries: Protects you from burning, but freezes you up.
- Beast Berries: Gives you strength, but also immense hunger.
- Sea Berries: Recovers some air and provides water breathing.
- Sinister Berries: Can be fed to most mobs to make them evil. Eating it yourself has no special effects.

Also adds 5 different status effects that 4 of the berries provide.
- Airy: Negates fall damage until you reach the ground. Increases knockback taken.
- Heavy: Slows you down significantly and makes you fall faster. Decreases knockback taken.
- Warmth: Continuously warms you up if you are freezing.
- Freezing: Continuously freezes you as if you were in powder snow (negated by wearing leather clothing).
- Convection: When eating special berries, their effect will be weakened and given to all surrounding mobs within range.

Many other berries and effects are currently in development.
